children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 1 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Finance of the Senate and the Committee on Ways and Means of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: HTS
children.label: 2 HTS
children.text: The term “HTS” means the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States.

children.heading: Identical goods
children.label: 3 Identical goods
children.text: The term “identical goods” means goods that are the same in all respects relevant to the rule of origin that qualifies the goods as originating goods.

children.heading: International Trade Commission
children.label: 4 International Trade Commission
children.text: The term “International Trade Commission” means the United States International Trade Commission.

children.heading: Mexico
children.label: 5 Mexico
children.text: The term “Mexico” means the United Mexican States.

children.heading: NAFTA
children.label: 6 NAFTA
children.text: The term “NAFTA” means the North American Free Trade Agreement approved by Congress under section 101(a)(1) of the North American Free Trade Agreement Implementation Act ().19 U.S.C. 3311(a)(1)1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Preferential tariff treatment
children.label: 7 Preferential tariff treatment
children.text: The term “preferential tariff treatment” means the customs duty rate that is applicable to an originating good (as defined in ) under the USMCA.section 4531(a) of this title

children.heading: Trade Representative
children.label: 8 Trade Representative
children.text: The term “Trade Representative” means the United States Trade Representative.

children.label: A
children.text: attached as an Annex to the Protocol Replacing the North American Free Trade Agreement with the Agreement between the United States of America, the United Mexican States, and Canada, done at Buenos Aires on , as amended by the Protocol of Amendment to the Agreement Between the United States of America, the United Mexican States, and Canada, done at Mexico City on ; andNovember 30, 2018December 10, 2019

children.label: B
children.text: approved by Congress under .section 4511(a)(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Canada for such time as the USMCA is in force with respect to, and the United States applies the USMCA to, Canada; and

children.label: B
children.text: Mexico for such time as the USMCA is in force with respect to, and the United States applies the USMCA to, Mexico.
